title: Hexed: Enchantments Expanded
description: Adding new cool Enchantments and Curses to the game VERY W.I.P.
body:
# Hexed: Enchantments Expanded
## Overview
A mod made to add Enchantments for now for
the meaning of combat but might be more later.
Also for the meaning of practicing my coding skills.
Enjoy :D
## Additions
### Enchantments
- Reeling
  - Ranges from level 1-3
  - Sword and Axe exclusive
  - Cannot be used with Knockback
  - Reverse Knockback
- Gale Burst
  - Ranges from level 1-3
  - Trident exclusive
  - Cannot be used with riptide
  - Wherever the teident lands summons a wind charge like burst
- Disarm
  - 1 level
  - Crossbow exclusive
  - When shot at a player holding up a shield is disables the shield like an axe
- Guard
  - Level 1-3
  - Shield exclusive
  - Thorns for shields
###  Bugs
- When using Disarm with fireworks they disappear and don't fire
### Bug fixes
- Reeling now works on players

*btw the mod icon is temporary while I make another one
